pi_items.source: Google Play Store official package identifier for Sygic GPS Navigation & Maps
Standard Android SharedPreferences storage location for app package com.sygic.aura, confirmed by Android documentation
Matches standard Android default SharedPreferences naming convention: {package_name}_preferences.xml, as per Android documentation
Sygic Professional Navigation SDK Settings API documentation shows the internal preference key is 'PlanningSettings', not 'Route computing' (which is the UI label)

Sygic Professional Navigation SDK Settings API documentation specifies PlanningSettings integer values: 1=Fastest, 2=Shortest, 3=Economic. The UI displays 'Economic route' not 'Economical'. Internal storage uses numeric value 3.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures Sygic GPS Navigation (com.sygic.aura) to use economical route computing. The app is real, not synthetic. The package name com.sygic.aura is correct and official. Preferences are stored at the standard Android location /data/data/com.sygic.aura/shared_prefs in a file following the standard naming pattern com.sygic.aura_preferences.xml. The route computing feature offers three options: Fastest, Shortest, and Economic. The internal preference key is 'PlanningSettings' with numeric values where 1=Fastest, 2=Shortest, and 3=Economic. The task description references 'Route computing' (UI label) but internally uses 'PlanningSettings'. The expected value for economical routing is the numeric value 3, not the string 'Economical'.
